title: Handshake vs Zopto — Honest Comparison for LinkedIn Automation (Zopto Shut Down)
description: Zopto has shut down. If you're looking for a Zopto alternative, here's how Handshake compares on features, pricing, and safety — and why teams are switching.

overview.handshake: Handshake is a cloud-based LinkedIn automation platform built for multi-sender rotation. Teams manage unlimited LinkedIn sender accounts from a single dashboard with built-in warmup scheduling, a unified inbox, and premium residential proxies on every plan. Pricing starts at $69/month for 1 sender, $199/month for 5 senders, and $299/month for 10 senders — all with unlimited team seats included.
overview.competitor: Zopto was a cloud-based LinkedIn automation tool that targeted agencies and sales teams with features like real-time lead generation, advanced filtering, and multi-channel outreach via LinkedIn and email. As of early 2026, Zopto has shut down operations and its website is no longer active. Former Zopto customers can contact their support email for account-related inquiries, but the platform is no longer accepting new users or serving existing campaigns. Zopto previously charged $197/month for their Personal plan and $297/month for their Agency plan per LinkedIn account.

featureComparison.handshake: Actively developed and supported — regular feature updates and responsive support
featureComparison.competitor: Shut down as of early 2026 — no longer operational

featureComparison.handshake: Built-in, core feature — rotate outreach across multiple LinkedIn accounts automatically
featureComparison.competitor: Was not available — each account was a separate subscription with no rotation between accounts

featureComparison.handshake: Automated warmup scheduling with gradual ramp-up for new accounts
featureComparison.competitor: Had basic activity scheduling but no dedicated warmup automation

featureComparison.handshake: Single inbox for all sender accounts — manage every conversation centrally
featureComparison.competitor: Had a dashboard for managing campaigns but no unified inbox across accounts

featureComparison.handshake: Unlimited team seats on every plan with shared workspaces
featureComparison.competitor: Agency plan offered team management features at $297/mo per account

featureComparison.handshake: Premium residential proxies included on all plans, human-like sending patterns
featureComparison.competitor: Had dedicated IP addresses but proxy quality and type varied

featureComparison.handshake: Built-in A/B testing on all plans
featureComparison.competitor: Had A/B testing for messages and sequences

featureComparison.handshake: Campaign targeting based on Sales Navigator filters and CSV imports
featureComparison.competitor: Had real-time lead generation with advanced filtering and engagement-based targeting
Was $197/mo for Personal plan per account (discontinued)

sections.handshakeWins:
The most important thing to know is that Zopto is no longer operational. As of early 2026, the platform has shut down entirely. For former Zopto users or anyone who had Zopto on their shortlist, Handshake addresses every core capability Zopto offered — and adds critical features Zopto never had.

Multi-sender rotation is the most significant upgrade. Zopto charged per LinkedIn account with no rotation between them — at $197-$297 per account, scaling to 5 accounts meant spending $985-$1,485/month. Handshake covers 5 senders for $199/month with automatic lead distribution across all accounts.

Handshake's unified inbox solves one of the biggest operational pain points Zopto users faced: managing conversations across multiple LinkedIn accounts from separate dashboards. With Handshake, every reply from every sender lands in one place.

The pricing difference is dramatic. Where Zopto charged $197/mo for a single account, Handshake starts at $69/mo and scales to 10 senders for $299/mo. For agencies that were paying Zopto $297/mo per client account, the savings are substantial.

Premium residential proxies are included on every Handshake plan, and unlimited team seats mean your entire organization can access the platform without per-seat charges.
sections.competitorWins:
To be fair about what Zopto offered when it was operational: their real-time lead generation with engagement-based targeting was a genuinely differentiated feature. Zopto could identify prospects who were actively engaging with specific content, making targeting more precise than standard Sales Navigator filters.

Zopto also offered built-in email integration for multichannel sequences — something Handshake doesn't include, as Handshake focuses specifically on LinkedIn automation. For teams that wanted LinkedIn + email in a single tool, Zopto delivered that before it shut down.

However, given that Zopto is no longer operational, these advantages are historical rather than actionable.
sections.whoShouldChooseHandshake: If you're a former Zopto user looking for a replacement, Handshake is a natural fit. It offers the same cloud-based infrastructure with better pricing, multi-sender rotation, and a unified inbox. If you were evaluating Zopto before it shut down, Handshake delivers the core capabilities at a fraction of the cost. Agencies managing multiple client accounts will see the most dramatic improvement — both in pricing and in operational efficiency.
sections.whoShouldChooseCompetitor: Zopto is no longer available. The platform shut down in early 2026 and is not accepting new customers or supporting existing ones. If you were a Zopto customer, you'll need to migrate to an alternative. Handshake, Expandi, and Dripify are the most commonly evaluated replacements.
sections.verdict: With Zopto shut down, this comparison is primarily useful for former Zopto customers evaluating alternatives. Handshake offers everything Zopto did — cloud infrastructure, LinkedIn automation, campaign management — at dramatically lower prices with the addition of multi-sender rotation and unified inbox. A team that was paying Zopto $1,485/month for 5 accounts can get the same (and more) from Handshake for $199/month. If you're migrating from Zopto, Handshake is the most cost-effective upgrade available.

faqs.question: What happened to Zopto?
faqs.answer: Zopto shut down operations in early 2026. The website now displays a closure notice directing former customers to contact their support email for account inquiries. The platform is no longer accepting new users or serving existing campaigns.

faqs.question: What's the best Zopto alternative?
faqs.answer: Handshake is the most direct replacement for Zopto's core capabilities — cloud-based LinkedIn automation with team features — at a significantly lower price point. Handshake adds multi-sender rotation and a unified inbox that Zopto never offered.

faqs.question: Can I migrate my campaigns from Zopto to Handshake?
faqs.answer: Since Zopto is no longer operational, you'll need to set up fresh campaigns in Handshake. Connect your LinkedIn accounts, import your prospect lists, and build new sequences. Most teams get running within a day.

faqs.question: How much cheaper is Handshake than Zopto was?
faqs.answer: Significantly cheaper. Zopto charged $197/mo per account for their Personal plan. Handshake offers 5 senders for $199/mo — the same price Zopto charged for a single account. For agencies running 10+ accounts, the savings are even more dramatic.

faqs.question: Does Handshake have email outreach like Zopto did?
faqs.answer: Handshake is focused on LinkedIn automation and doesn't include built-in email outreach. Many Handshake users pair it with a dedicated cold email tool for multichannel campaigns — which often delivers better results than an all-in-one approach.
